about_fund.description: Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Quant Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 14 Apr 1996. Sanjeev Sharma is the Current Fund Manager of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Manageme Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Quant Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 14 Apr 1996. Sanjeev Sharma is the Current Fund Manager of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹88,796 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 11 Mar 2026 is ₹250.52. The Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year ...Read more
about_fund.investment_objective: The scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation by investing in a well-diversified portfolio of small cap companies.

faqs.question: How to Invest in Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: You can easily invest in Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps:Log on to your Groww accountSearch for Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth from the search boxIn order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to completeOnce you are done with that, you can start investing in Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

faqs.question: What kind of returns does Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth provide?
faqs.answer: The Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth has been there from 07 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 4.60% since its inception.

faqs.question: How much expense ratio is charged by Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The termExpense Ratioused for Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund.The Expense Ratio of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is 0.81% as of 12 Mar 2026...

faqs.question: What is the AUM of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The AUM, short forAssets Under Managementof Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is ₹27,653.65Cr as of 12 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: How to Redeem Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: If you want to sell your Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

faqs.question: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: You can select eitherSIPorLumpsuminvestment of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth based on your investment objective and risk tolerance.

faqs.question: What is the NAV of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The NAV of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is ₹250.52 as of 11 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: What is the PE and PB ratio of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: ThePE ratioratio of Quant Small Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and thePB ratioof the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).

faqs.answer: If you want to sell your Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

faqs.question: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: You can select eitherSIPorLumpsuminvestment of Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth based on your investment objective and risk tolerance.

faqs.question: What is the NAV of Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The NAV of Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is ₹14.94 as of 11 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: What is the PE and PB ratio of Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: ThePE ratioratio of Quant Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and thePB ratioof the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).

Invest in a few minutes with the following steps:Log on to your Groww accountSearch for Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth from the search boxIn order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to completeOnce you are done with that, you can start investing in Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

faqs.question: What kind of returns does Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth provide?
faqs.answer: The Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth has been there from 07 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 5.80% since its inception.

faqs.question: How much expense ratio is charged by Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The termExpense Ratioused for Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund.The Expense Ratio of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is 0.89% as of 12 Mar 2026...

faqs.question: What is the AUM of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The AUM, short forAssets Under Managementof Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is ₹826.63Cr as of 12 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: How to Redeem Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: If you want to sell your Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

faqs.question: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: You can select eitherSIPorLumpsuminvestment of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth based on your investment objective and risk tolerance.

faqs.question: What is the NAV of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The NAV of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is ₹88.37 as of 11 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: What is the PE and PB ratio of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: ThePE ratioratio of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and thePB ratioof the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
